G1966.derivation: feminine singular participle of a comparative of G1909 (ἐπί) and (to go);
G1966.strongs_def: supervening, i.e. (G2250 (ἡμέρα) or G3571 (νύξ) being expressed or implied) the ensuing day or night

G1984.strongs_def: inspection (for relief); by implication, superintendence; specially, the Christian "episcopate"
G1984.kjv_def: the office of a "bishop", bishoprick, visitation

G1988.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a presumed derivative of G2476 (ἵστημι);

G1980.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G4649 (σκοπός);
G1980.strongs_def: to inspect, i.e. (by implication) to select; by extension, to go to see, relieve

G1989.strongs_def: to enjoin (by writing), i.e. (genitive case) to communicate by letter (for any purpose)

G1918.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G1062 (γάμος);
G1918.strongs_def: to form affinity with, i.e. (specially) in a levirate way

G1956.strongs_def: to solve further, i.e. (figuratively) to explain, decide

G1993.strongs_def: to put something over the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) to silence

G1939.strongs_def: a longing (especially for what is forbidden)

G1911.strongs_def: to throw upon (literal or figurative, transitive or reflexive; usually with more or less force); specially (with G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ) implied) to reflect; impersonally, to belong to
G1911.kjv_def: beat into, cast (up-)on, fall, lay (on), put (unto), stretch forth, think on

G1968.strongs_def: to embrace (with affection) or seize (with more or less violence; literally or figuratively)
G1968.kjv_def: fall into (on, upon) lie on, press upon

G1976.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G4476 (ῥαφίς);
G1976.strongs_def: to stitch upon, i.e. fasten with the needle

G1904.strongs_def: to supervene, i.e. arrive, occur, impend, attack, (figuratively) influence

G1967.derivation: perhaps from the same as G1966 (ἐπιοῦσα);
G1967.strongs_def: tomorrow's; but more probably from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of the present participle feminine of G1510 (εἰμί); for subsistence, i.e. needful

G1951.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3004 (λέγω);

G1901.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1614 (ἐκτείνω);

G1962.strongs_def: to nod at, i.e. (by implication) to assent

G1986.strongs_def: to draw over, i.e. (with G203 (ἀκροβυστία) implied) efface the mark of circumcision (by recovering with the foreskin)

G1973.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of the latter part of G1971 (ἐπιποθέω);

G1947.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and a (prolonged) form of the base of G2877 (κοράσιον) (in the sense of servant);

G1928.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1299 (διατάσσω);
G1928.strongs_def: to appoint besides, i.e. supplement (as a codicil)

G1920.strongs_def: to arrive upon, i.e. spring up (as a wind)

G1952.strongs_def: to leave upon, i.e. (figuratively) to be insufficient for

G1950.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2990 (λανθάνω);
G1950.strongs_def: to lose out of mind; by implication, to neglect

G1900.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and (the accusative case plural neuter of) G1565 (ἐκεῖνος);
G1900.strongs_def: upon those parts of, i.e. on the further side of

G1978.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and some form of the base of G4591 (σημαίνω);

G1982.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G4639 (σκιά);
G1982.strongs_def: to cast a shade upon, i.e. (by analogy) to envelop in a haze of brilliancy; figuratively, to invest with preternatural influence

G1912.strongs_def: to be heavy upon, i.e. (pecuniarily) to be expensive to; figuratively, to be severe towards

G1907.strongs_def: to hold upon, i.e. (by implication) to retain; (by extension) to detain; (with implication, of G3563 (νοῦς)) to pay attention to
G1907.kjv_def: give (take) heed unto, hold forth, mark, stay

G1909.strongs_def: properly, meaning superimposition (of time, place, order, etc.), as a relation of distribution (with the genitive case), i.e. over, upon, etc.; of rest (with the dative case) at, on, etc.; of direction (with the accusative case) towards, upon, etc.
G1909.kjv_def: about (the times), above, after, against, among, as long as (touching), at, beside, X have charge of, (be-, (where-))fore, in (a place, as much as, the time of, -to), (because) of, (up-)on (behalf of), over, (by, for) the space of, through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), with

G1963.strongs_def: attention of the mind, i.e. (by implication) purpose

G1927.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1218 (δῆμος);
G1927.strongs_def: to make oneself at home, i.e. (by extension) to reside (in a foreign country)

G1917.derivation: from a presumed compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1014 (βούλομαι);
G1917.strongs_def: a plan against someone, i.e. a plot

G1921.strongs_def: to know upon some mark, i.e. recognize; by implication, to become fully acquainted with, to acknowledge

G1934.strongs_def: to search (inquire) for; intensively, to demand, to crave

G1999.derivation: from the middle voice of a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G4921 (συνιστάω);
G1999.strongs_def: a conspiracy, i.e. concourse (riotous or friendly)
G1999.kjv_def: that which cometh upon, + raising up

G1926.strongs_def: to admit (as a guest or (figuratively) teacher)

G1902.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1746 (ἐνδύω);

G1996.strongs_def: to collect upon the same place

G1987.derivation: apparently a middle voice of G2186 (ἐφίστημι) (with G3563 (νοῦς) implied);
G1987.strongs_def: to put the mind upon, i.e. comprehend, or be acquainted with

G1975.strongs_def: to journey further, i.e. travel on (reach)

G1946.strongs_def: an Epicurean or follower of Epicurus

G1961.strongs_def: to stay over, i.e. remain (figuratively, persevere)

G1969.strongs_def: to chastise, i.e. (with words) to upbraid

G1985.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4649 (σκοπός) (in the sense of G1983 (ἐπισκοπέω));
G1985.strongs_def: a superintendent, i.e. Christian officer in genitive case charge of a (or the) church (literally or figuratively)

G1998.strongs_def: to hasten together upon one place (or a particular occasion)

G1944.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G2672 (καταράομαι);

G1929.strongs_def: to give over (by hand or surrender)
G1929.kjv_def: deliver unto, give, let (+ (her drive)), offer

G1997.strongs_def: a complete collection; especially a Christian meeting (for worship)

G1959.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and the same as G3199 (μέλω);

G1930.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G3717 (ὀρθός);
G1930.strongs_def: to straighten further, i.e. (figuratively) arrange additionally

G1979.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G4621 (σῖτος);

G1937.strongs_def: to set the heart upon, i.e. long for (rightfully or otherwise)

G1983.strongs_def: to oversee; by implication, to beware

G1913.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a reduplicated derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις) (compare G307 (ἀναβιβάζω));

G1922.strongs_def: recognition, i.e. (by implication) full discernment, acknowledgement

G1981.strongs_def: to tent upon, i.e. (figuratively) abide with

G1971.strongs_def: to dote upon, i.e. intensely crave possession (lawfully or wrongfully)

G1908.derivation: from a comparative of G1909 (ἐπί) and (probably) (threats);

G1905.strongs_def: to ask for, i.e. inquire, seek

G1945.kjv_def: impose, be instant, (be) laid (there-, up-)on, (when) lay (on), lie (on), press upon

G1949.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2983 (λαμβάνω);
G1949.strongs_def: to seize (for help, injury, attainment, or any other purpose; literally or figuratively)
G1949.kjv_def: catch, lay hold (up-)on, take (by, hold of, on)

G1910.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G939 (βάσις);
G1910.strongs_def: to walk upon, i.e. mount, ascend, embark, arrive
G1910.kjv_def: come (into), enter into, go abroad, sit upon, take ship

G1960.derivation: adverb from a derivative of G1959 (ἐπιμελέομαι);

G1941.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2564 (καλέω);
G1941.strongs_def: to entitle; by implication, to invoke (for aid, worship, testimony, decision, etc.)

G1914.strongs_def: to gaze at (with favor, pity or partiality)
G1914.kjv_def: look upon, regard, have respect to
